name: GPT-Image-1.5
capabilities: Text-to-Image Generation: Higher quality image generation with up to 4x faster speed
Image Editing: Precise editing via masks without distorting faces or logos
Multiple Formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP output formats
Superior Text Rendering: Unprecedented accuracy for text within images
Improved Instruction Following: Tighter prompt alignment than gpt-image-1
best_practices: Use descriptive, detailed prompts for better results
Use appropriate output formats for use case
Save image IDs from tool responses to access images later via resources
examples: generate_image(prompt='A serene mountain landscape at sunset', quality='high', size='landscape')
edit_image(image_data='data:image/png;base64,...', prompt='Add a rainbow to the sky')
